headline: CRITICAL, MAJOR OR MINOR?
subheading: Decode how the MHRA grades every inspection finding and protect your licence with the right response.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition visualising regulatory risk grading inside a pristine glass-walled pharmaceutical quality suite. Three abstract glowing tiers ascend in a stepped hierarchy, rendered as translucent stacked glass plates and bars deepening from a calm teal base, through brighter cyan, to an intense deep-navy apex with a single subtle fresh-green accent pulse marking the highest tier. A faint magnifying-glass lens flare hovers near the structure suggesting inspector scrutiny, while crisp risk-gradient curves and concentric severity rings ripple outward across an immaculate reflective surface. Soft natural daylight, creamy bokeh, gleaming sterile cleanroom textures receding out of focus, authoritative and premium atmosphere, shallow depth of field, deep navy shadows with teal and cyan dominance and a restrained green highlight. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
